question: What text overlay appears with a yellow arrow pointing to the animal in the water? A. This ain't real. B. a KITTEN C. so they pulled him up D. These guys were out in their boat

What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A man wearing a blue t-shirt and beige shorts kneels on the deck of a maroon boat. He leans over the side towards a small animal swimming in the calm lake water. Fishing rods lie on the grey deck near his knees. Dense green forest lines the far shore across the water. The man reaches his hand out to the animal.

Describe the sequence of interactions between the man on the boat and the animal in the water from the beginning of the clip until the rescue attempt.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a man kneels on the boat deck looking at the water; at 2s, a small animal creates ripples swimming toward the hull; at 6s, the man reaches his hand out towards the swimmer; at 14s, the animal clings to the side of the boat; at 18s, the man leans over the gunwale to pull the animal up.
